items.title: India's inflation accelerates to 4.38% in June, exceeding forecasts
items.description: Inflation has risen for the eighth straight month in India, as food and energy prices rise due to the Iran war and deficient rainfall.

items.title: Chinese EV makers are outpacing U.S. automakers in overseas investments
items.description: China has a saturated domestic market, which has led Chinese companies to look elsewhere to sell electric vehicles.

items.title: Meta's Louisiana data center investment to reach $50 billion, aided by generous tax incentives
items.description: Meta said the planned Hyperion data center supercluster in Richland Parish, Louisiana, will be a 5GW facility and cost over $50 billion.

items.title: U.S. and Iran exchange strikes as Strait of Hormuz standoff escalates
items.description: Iran responded to a fresh wave of strikes by U.S. forces by launching an attack on American military bases in several Gulf states.

items.title: Europe's Anduril rival Helsing raises $1.8 billion at $18 billion valuation
items.description: Helsing said "investor demand significantly exceeded the available allocation" for its $1.8 billion funding round.

items.title: SK Hynix South Korean shares clock worst day, sinking over 15%, after stellar Nasdaq debut
items.description: SK Hynix Inc. shares tumbled over 15% in Seoul on Monday after the chipmaker's blockbuster Nasdaq debut.

items.title: TSMC, the world's largest contract chipmaker, reports 68% surge in June revenue
items.description: Ahead of its second-quarter earnings, TSMC reported its June and first-half revenue for 2026.

items.title: U.S. and Iran trade airstrikes again amid conflicting claims over Strait of Hormuz
items.description: The U.S. and Iran exchanged a barrage of missile and drone airstrikes amid a dispute over the status of the Strait of Hormuz.

items.title: While Musk's Neuralink drills into skulls, China's BrainCo bets the future of brain tech is wearable
items.description: Interest in brain-computer interfaces is rising as it promises to help people with compromised neural abilities.

items.title: McConnell provides health update after long unexplained absence; says he suffered fall, pneumonia
items.description: McConnell is the longest-serving party leader in Senate history.

items.title: I’ve studied more than 200 kids: Parents whose children actually enjoy talking to them do 7 things
items.description: After studying more than 200 parent-child relationships, parenting expert Reem Raouda shares the habits that help kids feel comfortable talking to their parents — from childhood through adulthood.

items.title: Elon Musk and Sam Altman spar on X after Apple files OpenAI lawsuit
items.description: Sam Altman insisted that Elon Musk was again obsessed with him because of an OpenAI model release earlier this week.

items.title: Who will replace Lindsey Graham in the Senate?
items.description: South Carolina GOP Rep. Nancy Mace and Gov. Henry McMaster are among the first to be floated for the Senate seat vacated by Lindsey Graham.

items.title: 'Funflation' hits home: Why staying in isn't the cost-saver it used to be
items.description: Following a wave of price hikes, at-home pastimes like streaming movies or playing video games are pinching pocketbooks.

items.title: Graham’s death complicates myriad GOP goals in Congress
items.description: South Carolina Republican Sen. Lindsey Graham died unexpectedly at 71.

items.title: Here are the 3 big things we're watching in the stock market this week
items.description: The state of the U.S. economy is in focus across bank earnings and inflation data.

items.title: Student loan borrowers on new RAP plan can lose key benefits if they pay even one day late
items.description: The new Repayment Assistance Plan, or RAP, offers benefits to federal student loan borrowers — but only if their bill is paid on time. Here's what to know.

items.title: Burnout, frustration and heartbreak: Amazon layoffs take their toll in saturated job market
items.description: In the eight-plus months since Amazon announced its most expansive job cuts ever, laid off workers have been thrust into an increasingly saturated labor market.

items.title: Majority of U.S. workers support an AI wealth fund as tech layoffs surge, survey finds
items.description: A majority of U.S. employees now want an AI sovereign wealth fund to hold corporations more accountable, according to a recent survey, as tech layoffs rise.

items.title: Top Wall Street analysts are confident about these 3 stocks for the long haul
items.description: Those looking for attractive stock picks amid the ongoing volatility can gain key insights by tracking the recommendations of top Wall Street analysts.
